description: Broadened the workload to require structured recovery metadata for plan-write discovery failures, then taught warcraft_plan_write to return machine-readable blocker details when plan content fails the discovery gate. Invalid drafts now return blockedReason, discoveryError, retry metadata, hints, and warnings instead of only prose, extending the structured recovery pattern across another real promotion blocker.

Broadened the workload to require structured recovery metadata when warcraft_task_expand tries to merge into a malformed draft plan, then taught that failure path to return machine-readable repair/retry details. Missing `## Tasks` sections now produce blockedReason, requiredSection, repairPlanWriteArgs, retryTaskExpandArgs, hints, and warnings, so agents can repair the draft and retry expansion without reconstructing the next commands from prose.

Broadened the workload to require structured recovery metadata when warcraft_task_expand is asked to promote a missing manual task, then taught that invalid-selection failure path to return availableManualTasks plus machine-readable retryTaskExpandArgs. This turns a previously prose-only correction loop into an exact recovery handoff for one of the most likely operator mistakes during manual-task promotion.
